description: Update PRD_RentalManagement_SaaS.md to document the contract scan upload feature, notes field for renters and staff, and the new API endpoint and migration file.
steps: 1. In Section 3 (MODULE 2 - Contract Management, around section 3.1 Database Schema): Add scan_pdf_url TEXT field to the contracts table schema. Add description: 'URL ban scan hop dong chinh thuc (PDF upload boi owner/manager)' in Vietnamese.
2. In Section 3.3 (API Endpoints): Add new endpoint POST /api/contracts/{id}/upload-scan with description: 'Upload ban scan hop dong chinh thuc (PDF), luu vao Supabase Storage' in Vietnamese.
3. In Section 3.2 (Luong tao hop dong): Add step about uploading scanned contract PDF after creation.
4. In Section 4 (MODULE 3 - Renter Management, section 4.1 Database Schema): Add notes TEXT field to renter_profiles table schema.
5. In Section 5 (MODULE 4 - Staff Management, section 5.1 Database Schema): Add notes TEXT field to profiles table schema reference.
6. Add reference to the new migration file 004_new_features.sql somewhere appropriate (e.g., a note after the schema sections mentioning the migration adds scan_pdf_url, notes columns).
acceptance_criteria: PRD Section 3 documents scan_pdf_url column in contracts schema
PRD Section 4 documents notes field for renter_profiles
PRD Section 5 mentions notes field for staff profiles
findings: Documentation-only change. All grep verification checks pass: scan_pdf_url (2 occurrences), upload-scan (2 occurrences), 004_new_features (1 occurrence). Notes field added to both renter_profiles and profiles table references.
